en: The scatterer has come up against you. Man the ramparts; watch the road; dress for battle; collect all your strength.
zh: 尼尼微啊！ 那分散邦國的必上來攻擊你， 你要固守堡壘， 嚴防要道，束緊你的腰， 大大增強你的力量。

en: For the LORD is restoring the majesty of Jacob as the majesty of Israel, for plunderers have plundered them and ruined their branches.
zh: 然而，耶和華必恢復雅各的光榮， 好像以色列的光榮一樣； 因為劫掠的人曾把他們劫掠一空， 又把他們的葡萄枝子毀壞了。

en: The shield of his mighty men is red; his soldiers are clothed in scarlet. The chariots come with flashing metal on the day he musters them; the cypress spears are brandished.
zh: 他勇士的盾牌是紅的， 戰士的衣服是朱紅的。 在他預備出擊的時候， 戰車的鋼鐵閃爍如火， 騎兵 疾馳。

en: The chariots race madly through the streets; they rush to and fro through the squares; they gleam like torches; they dart like lightning.
zh: 戰車在街上狂奔， 在廣場上東奔西馳； 它們看起來像火把， 跑起來像閃電。

en: He remembers his officers; they stumble as they go, they hasten to the wall; the siege tower is set up.
zh: 亞述王召集他的權臣， 他們跌跌撞撞而來， 急急忙忙走上城牆， 豎起了防禦的擋牌。

en: The river gates are opened; the palace melts away;
zh: 河閘都被打開， 宮殿也給摧毀了。

en: its mistress is stripped; she is carried off, her slave girls lamenting, moaning like doves and beating their breasts.
zh: 王后赤身被擄去； 她的宮女都哀哭， 聲如鴿子， 各人搥胸痛哭。

en: Nineveh is like a pool whose waters run away. "Halt! Halt!" they cry, but none turns back.
zh: 自古以來，尼尼微一直都像個聚水的池， 但現在居民卻不斷潰逃 ； 雖然有人呼叫：“止住！止住！” 卻沒有回轉的。

en: Plunder the silver, plunder the gold! There is no end of the treasure or of the wealth of all precious things.
zh: 你們劫掠銀子，搶奪金子吧！ 積蓄的財寶無窮無盡， 珍貴的器皿不可勝數。

en: Desolate! Desolation and ruin! Hearts melt and knees tremble; anguish is in all loins; all faces grow pale!
zh: 現在卻空虛、荒涼，一無所有； 人心驚惶，兩膝發抖， 全身疼痛， 面無血色。

en: Where is the lions' den, the feeding place of the young lions, where the lion and lioness went, where his cubs were, with none to disturb?
zh: 獅子的洞穴在哪裡？ 餵養幼獅的地方在哪裡？ 公獅、母獅和幼獅不受驚嚇之處，可以閒遊的地方又在哪裡呢？

en: The lion tore enough for his cubs and strangled prey for his lionesses; he filled his caves with prey and his dens with torn flesh.
zh: 公獅為幼獅撕碎足夠的食物， 為母獅掐死活物； 把獵物塞滿了牠的洞， 把撕碎的填滿了牠的穴。

en: Behold, I am against you, declares the LORD of hosts, and I will burn your chariots in smoke, and the sword shall devour your young lions. I will cut off your prey from the earth, and the voice of your messengers shall no longer be heard.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華說： 看哪！我必攻擊你， 我要把你的 戰車焚燒成煙， 刀劍必吞滅你的幼獅； 我必從地上除去你的獵物， 你使者的聲音也必不再有人聽見。
